characters.HUMAN: Bald human in an orange space suit with brown shoulder pads and a circular emblem on the chest.
characters.ALIEN: Small green alien with big round eyes, a single pink gem on its forehead, seated in a white robotic walking chair with two mechanical legs.
characters.EARTH_BUNNY: Small brown Earth rabbit with long ears, seen on the grassy field on page 1.
characters.ALIEN_BUNNY: Large teal rabbit-like alien creature with antennas on its head and later shown with sharp fangs.

lines.dialogue: And this is what we Earthlings call a "bunny."
lines.notes: Speaking like a tour guide, gesturing toward the rabbit.

lines.dialogue: How interesting. We have a strikingly similar creature on our planet.
lines.notes: Sounds genuinely fascinated, polite tone.
Short, questioning response, eyebrows raised.
Enthusiastic affirmation, one finger raised.

lines.dialogue: I'll show you! Allow me to simply locate one aaand...
lines.notes: Starts excited; trails into focus as it scans with a holographic display.
Electronic caption appearing amid teleportation effects; no character mouth movement.
Spoken calmly as teleportation effect finalizes.

lines.dialogue: See? They look nearly identical to your Earth "bunny."
lines.notes: Alien is pleased with its comparison, emphasizing the similarity.

lines.dialogue: Well, besides the color and antennas of course.
lines.notes: Tone turns a bit self-aware and humorous as it admits the obvious differences.

lines.dialogue: Uh... It's also quite a bit bigger.
lines.notes: Uneasy, hesitating at the start while looking up at the huge creature.
Same upbeat catchphrase, seemingly unconcerned by the size.

lines.emotion: alarmed but trying to stay calm
lines.notes: Voice likely tight; pointing out a dangerous detail.
More serious tone, emphasizing the threat.
Still unfazed, responding with its usual enthusiasm.

lines.emotion: playfully emphatic then slipping into fear
lines.notes: Drawn-out word suggests forced cheer; body language hints the alien is starting to realize the danger.

lines.dialogue: You DID NOT mean to teleport this close to it, did you.
lines.notes: Voice raised with emphasis on the mistake, eyes wide with fear.
Shouted, panicked version of its usual catchphrase.
Trying to stay practical despite the looming danger.
Automatic catchphrase before realizing it cannot act.

lines.dialogue: Unfortunately, however, it seems I have become utterly paralyzed by fear!
lines.notes: Overly formal phrasing while clearly freaking out.

lines.dialogue: Therefore, if I may use a bit of Earth slang, I suspect we have become toast.
lines.notes: Trying to sound analytical but essentially declaring doom with dark humor.
Flat, resigned echo of the alien's catchphrase as the creature looms overhead.
